hero.title: K9 Leisure Club's Dog Grooming Salon in Kidderminster

sections.title: Get Your Groom On
paragraphs: Does your furry friend need a little sprucing up? Maybe it's time for a full makeover?
At K9 Leisure Club, our expert dog groomers will have your pup looking and feeling their best in our state-of-the-art dog salon in Kidderminster.

sections.title: Our Dog Grooming Services
paragraphs: We provide complete canine grooming services from maintenance visits to full restyle appointments.
bullets: De-Shedding: Specialised treatment designed to reduce shedding and improve coat condition.
Bathing & Drying: A luxurious bathing and drying service for a fresh, pampered finish.
Styling: Breed-specific cuts, clipping, and scissoring for the right look.
Nail Clipping: Professional nail care for healthy paws.
Hand Stripping: Expert hand stripping for wire-haired coats.
Eye & Ear Cleaning: Hygiene care to keep your dog comfortable.
Anal Gland Expression: Professional care to prevent discomfort from impacted glands.

sections.title: Our Dog Grooming Services and Prices
paragraphs: Dog size pricing: Small de-shed from GBP 30, bathing and drying from GBP 25, styling from GBP 35.
Medium de-shed from GBP 40, bathing and drying from GBP 30, styling from GBP 40.
Large de-shed from GBP 45, bathing and drying from GBP 35, styling from GBP 45.
Extra large de-shed from GBP 60, bathing and drying from GBP 50, styling from GBP 60+.
Add-ons include nail clipping from GBP 10, eye and ear cleaning from GBP 10, and anal gland expression from GBP 10.
Puppy Introduction: Puppies first groom is GBP 25 for all sizes up to 6 months.

sections.title: Book your dog's grooming appointment today!
paragraphs: Looking for dog groomers near me or dog clipping near me in Kidderminster? You've come to the right place!
K9 Leisure Club is the pawfect choice for all your dog grooming needs.
